manifest.description: Social media management via the Zernio API — schedule posts, manage inbox, and view analytics across 14+ platforms.
manifest.author: SGNL Studio

zernioApiKey.title: Zernio API Key
zernioApiKey.description: Enter a secret name from project env (e.g. ZERNIO_API_KEY) or paste a raw API key (sk_…). Secret names are resolved at runtime.

defaultProfileId.title: Default Profile ID
defaultProfileId.description: Optional default Zernio profile ID for operations.

webhooks.description: Receives webhook events from Zernio (post.published, post.failed, message.received, etc.).
